CALCULATE_PROBABILITY_FORMULA: p.y = -0.77 + .665 * pFunc.logitdec( p.overallOutcomeHistory.slice( Math.max(p.overallOutcomeHistory.length-60,  0),   p.overallOutcomeHistory.length),  .966)+ .51* (p.stimSuccessCount) + 11.1 * pFunc.recency(p.stimSecsSinceLastShown,  .443) ; p.probability = 1.0 / (1.0 + Math.exp(-p.y));  return p
